name: Marvin Aguilar
title: Software Engineer II
tagline: I build resilient, elegant systems — one commit at a time.
epigraph: When one falls, we continue. — Expedition motto
summary: Software Engineer II with a focus on full-stack web development, distributed systems, and developer experience. I care about code that is correct, readable, and kind to the next engineer who touches it.
I have shipped production features across React/TypeScript front ends and JVM & Node back ends, comfortable owning a slice end-to-end: schema, service, UI, and the tests that keep it honest.
Off the clock you'll find me replaying story-driven RPGs, sketching UI ideas, and over-engineering my personal projects for the joy of it.
